untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of specific economic report releases (PPI, Unemployment, Retail Sales) and Treasury auction dates as entry triggers. These are external calendar/event data points, not price/technical indicators available in the allowed indicator set. The exact stochastic threshold value is marked as [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] and was not provided in source material. Used midpoint threshold (50) as placeholder, but optimal threshold requires author specification.
translation_notes: Signal is EVENT-driven and CONTEXT_DEPENDENT on macroeconomic calendar. The 1-day raw stochastic (stoch_k) is used with placeholder threshold of 50 (0-100 scale). Direction reverses based on economic report direction: bullish reports trigger long entries at high stochastic readings, bearish reports trigger short entries at low readings. Exit on stochastic reversal (AUTHOR_SILENT reversal logic applied). Hold period set to 1 day reflecting short-term Treasury market microstructure. Study sample of 175 report days suggests intraday/overnight holding patterns. Backtest engine must provide external event calendar input for economic reports and auction dates to fully operationalize this signal.
